gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/573)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/573)
text: قَالَ لَيْسَ حُسْنُ الْجِوَارِ كَفَّ الْأَذَى وَ لَكِنَّ حُسْنَ الْجِوَارِ صَبْرُكَ عَلَى الْأَذَى .

en.hubeali: From him, from one of his companions, from Salih Bin Hamza, from Al Hassan Bin Abdullah,

(It has been narrated) from Abd Salih<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said: ‘Good neighbourliness is not restraint from harming (the neighbour), but good neighbourliness is your patience upon the harm (done to you by the neighbour)’.
en.sarwar: 8. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from al-Nahiki from Ibrahim ibn ‘Abd al-Hamid from al-Hakam al-Khayyat who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Maintaining good neighborly relations increases the development of the country and one’s life span.’”
